LanguageData.VXP.Search: Patch type, mod name, xpath, filename, attribute
LanguageData.VXP.SearchWithoutXmlValues: Patch type, mod name, xpath, filename, attribute
LanguageData.VXP.SearchWithXmlValues: Patch type, mod name, xpath, filename, attribute, XML value
LanguageData.VXP.IncludeXmlValuesTooltip: When enabled, expanded rows show XML values and search can match XML value contents. Disable this for the fastest browsing on large mod lists.
LanguageData.VXP.CollapseAllTooltip: Collapse all visible mod groups and patch details.
LanguageData.VXP.ExpandAllTooltip: Expand all visible mod groups and patch details.
LanguageData.VXP.XmlValueHidden: XML value hidden. Enable Include XML values to show or search it.
